from biomni.tool.database import query_monarch

gene_symbol = "PIEZO2"
print(f"Step 2: Querying Monarch for diseases associated with gene {gene_symbol}...")
result_monarch = query_monarch(prompt=f"diseases associated with {gene_symbol}", max_results=20, verbose=True)
print("Saved result in variable result_monarch. Printing result (truncated if long):")
print(result_monarch)
</execute><solution>{'disease_name': 'Marden-Walker-like syndrome (MDNS)', 'OMIM_ID': '616843'}</solution>
